data.title: nDatalyze Joins Semi-Annual Reporting Pilot as RTO and Sports Tech Project Advance
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

nDatalyze Corp ( (TSE:NDAT) ) has provided an update.

nDatalyze Corp. plans to shift from quarterly to semi-annual financial reporting under the Canadian Securities Administrators’ pilot program, a move it says will cut compliance costs and free management to focus on its core AI-powered mental health technologies. The company will continue to file audited annual results and six-month interim statements while maintaining ongoing material disclosure.

Management also reported progress on a potential reverse takeover with Prism Diversified Ltd., saying pre-RTO financing is advancing and a definitive agreement is expected in the near term. In parallel, nDatalyze has completed a commercialization report for its Epitome sports performance assessment platform, refining target markets, sales channels, pricing strategy and seasonality, and is now weighing commercialization options.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:NDAT) stock is a Hold with a C$0.10 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on nDatalyze Corp stock, see the TSE:NDAT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NDAT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NDAT is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by very weak financial performance (collapsed revenue, ongoing losses, and cash burn). Technicals are a key positive with price above major moving averages and positive MACD, while valuation remains pressured by unprofitability. Corporate events add uncertainty due to RTO-related execution and approval risk.

To see Spark’s full report on NDAT stock, click here.

More about nDatalyze Corp

nDatalyze Corp. is a Calgary-based venture issuer that develops technology-driven health and performance solutions, leveraging advanced artificial intelligence and biometric data analysis. The company focuses on mental health applications and related performance assessment tools aimed at specialized markets such as sports development.

Average Trading Volume: 55,938

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$2.89M

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

NatWest Group ( (NWG) ) has provided an announcement.

NatWest Group plc disclosed that The Capital Group Companies, Inc., a major U.S.-based investment management group, has reduced its holding in NatWest to 4.991397% of voting rights as of 24 March 2026, from a previous level of 5.005597%. The position, comprising 1,592,753,108 voting rights across common stock and depository receipts and held on behalf of client accounts rather than for Capital Group’s own account, means the investor has slipped just below the 5% UK disclosure threshold, a marginal change that signals continued but slightly diminished institutional support for NatWest’s shareholder base.

The most recent analyst rating on (NWG) stock is a Hold with a $15.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on NatWest Group stock, see the NWG Stock Forecast page.

The score is driven primarily by mid-range financial performance—good profitability and an improving balance sheet, but weighed down by volatile revenue and inconsistent cash flow. Technicals are weak with bearish trend signals despite oversold readings. Valuation is a clear positive with a low P/E and supported dividend yield, while the earnings call was constructive on returns and capital generation but highlighted meaningful macro, regulatory, and acquisition execution risks.

To see Spark’s full report on NWG stock, click here.

More about NatWest Group

NatWest Group plc is a UK-based banking and financial services group headquartered in London, providing retail, commercial and institutional banking services primarily in the UK and Western Europe. The group focuses on lending, deposit-taking, payments and wealth management, and is a major listed issuer of common stock and depository receipts in international capital markets.

Morgan Advanced Materials has disclosed a transaction involving Laurent Cohen-Scali, President of Thermal Products and a person discharging managerial responsibilities. He received 56,185 ordinary shares through the vesting of an award under the Morgan Advanced Materials Share Plan 2022, granted in September 2025.

To meet tax obligations arising on the vesting, Cohen-Scali sold 29,974 shares at £1.972 each on the London Stock Exchange, retaining 26,211 shares. The disclosure is made under Article 19 of the Market Abuse Regulation, underscoring the company’s adherence to regulatory requirements on insider dealing and transparency in executive share dealings.

data.title: Arctic Fox Lithium Raises $1.62 Million in First-Tranche Placement and Refreshes Leadership Team
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Arctic Fox Ventures ( (TSE:AFX) ) has issued an announcement.

Arctic Fox Lithium Corp. has closed the first tranche of its non-brokered private placement, issuing 6,744,000 units at $0.24 each for gross proceeds of $1.62 million, with each unit comprising one common share and a warrant exercisable at $0.315 over 24 months. The funds will support working capital, transaction costs and exploration on the Shipshaw Property and other projects, while the deal structure, including cash and equity-based finder’s fees, underscores ongoing investor appetite for early-stage lithium and rare earth exploration exposure.

The company also strengthened its leadership team by appointing veteran energy and environmental services executive Tyler Heathcote to the board, replacing longtime director and former CFO Sonny Chew. Concurrently, director Rick Mah has been named Chief Financial Officer, signaling a governance and finance refresh intended to bolster Arctic Fox’s strategic growth, operational oversight and capital markets execution as it advances its mineral exploration portfolio.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:AFX) stock is a Hold with a C$0.44 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Arctic Fox Ventures stock, see the TSE:AFX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AFX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AFX is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, persistent losses, negative equity, and cash burn). Technicals are mixed with a better longer-term trend but limited near-term momentum, while valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no dividend support. Corporate actions (financings and an exploration asset acquisition) provide some operational runway but also underscore dependence on new capital.

To see Spark’s full report on AFX stock, click here.

More about Arctic Fox Ventures

Arctic Fox Lithium Corp. is a junior mineral exploration company focused on acquiring and developing mineral properties containing rare earth metals, positioning itself within the critical minerals and battery materials value chain. The company’s portfolio includes the Shipshaw Property and other mineral assets, reflecting a strategy centered on early-stage exploration and resource development in key jurisdictions.

data.title: Novo Nordisk AGM Backs 2025 Dividend, Expands Capital Mandates and Refreshes Board
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Novo Nordisk ( (NVO) ).

Novo Nordisk held its Annual General Meeting in Bagsværd, Denmark, on 26 March 2026, approving the 2025 statutory annual report, profit distribution and a total 2025 dividend of DKK 11.70 per A and B share, including a final DKK 7.95 to be paid in March 2026. Shareholders backed the 2025 remuneration report, set Board pay for 2026 and endorsed continued capital flexibility through an authorisation to repurchase up to 10% of share capital and an extended mandate to increase capital until April 2028.

The meeting re-elected chair Lars Rebien Sørensen, vice chair Cees de Jong and several directors, added three new board members, and re-appointed Deloitte for financial and sustainability audits, while shifting general meeting venue rules to the Region of Eastern Denmark. Following the AGM, the Board reshaped its committee structure and confirmed that Poul Weihrauch will serve as a board observer for 2026/27 ahead of a planned nomination in 2027, signalling continuity and gradual renewal in governance as Novo Nordisk navigates what it described as a transformative period after 2025.

The most recent analyst rating on (NVO) stock is a Hold with a $40.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Novo Nordisk stock, see the NVO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NVO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NVO is a Neutral.

The score reflects strong underlying financial quality and attractive valuation, partially offset by a very weak technical setup (downtrend across all key moving averages) and a cautious near-term outlook from management, including guidance for declining 2026 sales and operating profit amid pricing and policy headwinds.

To see Spark’s full report on NVO stock, click here.

More about Novo Nordisk

Novo Nordisk is a leading global healthcare company founded in 1923 and headquartered in Denmark, specialising in treatments for serious chronic diseases, particularly diabetes. The group focuses on scientific innovation, expanding access to medicines and prevention, employs about 68,800 people in 80 countries, and markets its products in roughly 170 countries, with listings in Copenhagen and New York.

Average Trading Volume: 24,044,687

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $162.2B

See more data about NVO stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: SK Telecom Moves to Fully Acquire SK Broadband via Cash Share Exchange
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Sk Telecom ( (SKM) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 26, 2026, SK Telecom’s board approved a cash-based share exchange to acquire all remaining shares of its fixed-line unit SK Broadband, turning it into a wholly owned subsidiary. The transaction values SK Broadband minority shares at 15,032 won per common share, with a share exchange ratio set at 1 SK Telecom to 0.1916882 SK Broadband, based on Korean securities law valuation methods.

SK Telecom will use its reference market price of 78,419 won per share, which exceeds its asset value, while SK Broadband’s price is derived from intrinsic value combining asset and profit metrics. An external appraisal by Deloitte Anjin, completed between March 3 and March 26, 2026, deemed the exchange ratio appropriate, and SK Telecom expects full ownership to improve management efficiency, enhance strategic flexibility and business synergies, and ultimately boost overall corporate value.

The most recent analyst rating on (SKM) stock is a Buy with a $31.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sk Telecom stock, see the SKM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SKM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SKM is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by the sharp profitability and return deterioration and a cautious earnings-call outlook tied to cybersecurity-related impacts, penalties, and subscriber pressure. Solid cash generation and a generally supported balance sheet help offset these risks, while technicals are mixed (short-term weakness but longer-term support) and valuation looks demanding given the earnings compression despite a moderate dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on SKM stock, click here.

More about Sk Telecom

SK Telecom Co., Ltd. is a leading South Korean telecommunications operator, historically focused on mobile services and increasingly active across converged connectivity and digital platforms. Its subsidiary SK Broadband Co., Ltd. provides fixed-line telecommunications services, positioning the group as an integrated provider across wireless and wireline networks in the Korean market.

Average Trading Volume: 1,656,721

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $11.18B

See more insights into SKM stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Wolfram Resources Reschedules AGM After Lack of Quorum
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Becket Invest PLC ( (GB:WFR) ) has issued an update.

Wolfram Resources PLC has disclosed that its adjourned Annual General Meeting, scheduled for 11:00 a.m. on 26 March 2026, was opened but could not proceed because a quorum of shareholders was not present. In response, the meeting was promptly adjourned and rescheduled to reconvene at the offices of AlbR Capital Limited in London at 3:00 p.m. on 31 March 2026.

The company confirmed that all proxy votes already submitted for the AGM resolutions will remain valid for the reconvened session, ensuring previously expressed shareholder preferences are preserved. The adjournment highlights a temporary governance delay but indicates an intention to complete the formal approval process once sufficient shareholder participation is secured, with further updates promised as necessary.

More about Becket Invest PLC

Wolfram Resources PLC is a U.K.-based company, with its shares listed in London, though the specific industry and product focus are not detailed in the announcement. The company holds its corporate meetings in the City of London, suggesting a capital markets-oriented shareholder base and governance framework aligned with U.K. corporate standards.

Average Trading Volume: 1,721,144

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

For a thorough assessment of WFR stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

STS Global Income & Growth Trust PLC ( (GB:STS) ) has shared an announcement.

STS Global Income & Growth Trust PLC has repurchased 50,000 of its own ordinary shares at 219.50 pence per share, with the shares to be held in treasury rather than cancelled. This transaction forms part of the trust’s capital management activities and may support its share price and net asset value per share over time.

Following the buyback, the company’s total issued share capital stands at 175,188,185 shares, of which 61,127,770 are held in treasury, leaving 114,060,415 shares carrying voting rights. The updated voting rights figure provides a new reference point for shareholders to assess and report any changes in their ownership stakes under FCA transparency rules.
